scripts.build: npm run build -w @pactia/schema && npm run build -w @pactia/pactiac
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @pactia/schema && npm run test -w @pactia/pactiac
scripts.export:ir-schemas: npm run build -w @pactia/schema && npm run export:ir-schemas -w @pactia/schema
scripts.generate:golden: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/generate-golden.ts
